## NAME
  alias — Terminal Depths built-in command

## SYNOPSIS
  alias [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
The `alias` command provides functionality within the Terminal Depths hacking simulation.

  Run `help {cmd}` in-game for current options.
